titleStmt.title: SII 12.144: original edition by V. Venkatasubba Ayyar
No. 144. (A.R. No. 97 of 1934-35). VṚIDDHĀCHALAM, VRIDDHACHALAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE KITCHEN IN THE VṚIDDHAGIRĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription, dated in the 4th year, registers a gift of 96 sheep by Āḷappiṟandāṉ-kōṉ Śuttāḻvāṉ for burning a sacred perpetual lamp before the god at Tirumudukuṉṟam in Paruvūr-kūṟṟam, a subdivision of Mēṟkā-nāḍu Iruṅgōḷappāḍi in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu.
The astronomical details given point to A.D. 1247, August 26, Monday (not Sunday) as the date of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . sakalabhuvanaccakravatti śrīkopperuñciṅkatevarkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu siṁ hanāyaṟṟu Apara
pakṣattu daśami yum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum puṇarpūcamum peṟṟa ṉāḷ vaṭakarai virutarājabha yaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkāṉāṭṭu
Iruṅkoḷappāṭip paruvūrkkūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tirumutukuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyanāṟku Āḷappiṟaṉtāṉ koṉ
cuttāḻvāṉ vaitta tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku tevāciriyaṉkālāl Aḷakkum nāḷ Oṉṟu kku ney Uḻakkāka vanta
ṭavatāka paccaikkoṉ makaṉ kuṉṟakkoṉ kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟuāṟu
ttavat paṉmāheśvara rakṣaiSome of the inscribed slabs are misplaced in the wall.
Digital edition of SII 12.144 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
